g.text: Cache Locality Comparison: HashMap vs Sparse Set

ul.li: Total: 3 cache misses/entity 100K entities × 3 = 300K cache misses @ ~100 cycles/miss = 30M cycles
1 cache line = 8 Positions 100K entities ÷ 8 = 12.5K cache lines @ ~40 cycles/line = 500K cycles

g.text: Only 1 useful Position per cache line fetch
